Home.title: Reptile Concept
Home.tagline: Reptiles, terrariums and supplies — responsible breeding in Lachine, QC
Home.why_breeding_body: All our animals are captive bred, healthy, and well socialized.
Home.why_advice_body: Our team helps you pick the right reptile and set up the perfect habitat.
Home.why_shipping_body: We ship across Quebec with weather checks and a live arrival guarantee.
Home.ctaBody: Browse our selection of reptiles and supplies to build the perfect habitat.
Home.animalsSubtitle: Discover our available reptiles, carefully bred in Lachine.

Footer.tagline: Your specialty reptile shop in Lachine, Quebec.

Boutique.title: Shop

Checkout.title: Checkout
Checkout.healthGuarantee: I accept the Live Arrival Guarantee policy and understand an unboxing video will be required for any claim.
Checkout.confirmationBody: Your order has been recorded under number
Checkout.nextSteps: Our team will confirm payment and check weather conditions before shipping. You'll receive an email as soon as your order ships.
